  "title": "Oval Solitaire Diamond Engagement Ring with Pave Band",
  "description": "Classic engagement ring featuring a four-prong oval center stone setting with a delicate pave diamond band. The ring has a yellow gold construction with an oval-cut center diamond and micro-pave diamonds along the band for added brilliance.",

    "height": 7,
    "depth": 2.5
  },
  "features": [

    "Micro-pave diamond band with approximately 20-24 accent stones",
    "Tapered band design from 2.5mm to 1.8mm",
    "Comfort fit interior",
    "Cathedral or low-profile setting height"
  ],
  "material": "14K or 18K Yellow Gold",
  "file_format": "STEP",
